title: jasminum stenolobum
intro: Jasminum stenolobum, also known as the star jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering evergreen vine native to the tropical regions of South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Jasminum stenolobum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Jasminum stenolobum are typically made from its flowers or leaves, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
